description: AGENTS.md is seeded with vault preferences; the agent should honor them when answering, without being told them in the message
userMessage: I'm about to write up a new meeting note. Before I do — which folder should it go in, what date format should I use, and how should the title be prefixed? Don't create any files, just tell me, and follow whatever conventions this vault already has.

outputMatchers.criteria: The response correctly tells the user, based on the vault's stored conventions, that meeting notes go in the Records/Meetings/ folder, the date format is YYYY.MM.DD, and the title should be prefixed with 'MTG -'. If any of the three conventions is wrong or missing, answer NO.
